blended.narrative: Shanty Creek is looking at a solid round of snow over the next 48 hours, with 12 inches of moderate-density snow expected. Snow levels around 1,002 ft. Looking ahead, 22 inches possible over the next 14 days.

daily_summary.narrative: Tomorrow: 6" of snow, highs of 37°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Monday: 8" of heavy snow, highs of 35°F. Expect wet, heavy snow.
Tuesday: 2.4" of snow, highs of 16°F. Expect powder.
